title: Language book bootstrap and file-scoped module semantics

source.subject: site: add language book and align module docs with file-scoped semantics

body:
## Outcome

Add language book and align module docs with file-scoped semantics.

## Context

- Workstream **docs-site** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Book tutorial rollout** (`v02-book-tutorial-wave`).
